title: 9 Herbal Teas to Ease Grief in Orphan
description: Valeriana officinalis teas, also known as valerian root tea, has been used for centuries to help with grief and emotional healing. This herbal tea contains properties such as isovaleric acid, valerenic acid, and valeranone, which contribute to its soothing and calming effects on the nervous system. The constituents, including valerenic acid and valeranone, interact with neurotransmitters in the brain to reduce stress and anxiety, promoting relaxation and a sense of calmness. When exper...
